message:
feat(security): distributed mode readiness checks and extension sandboxing (wa-fno.4)

Two security frameworks for safe networking and extension execution:

Distributed Mode Readiness:
- ReadinessReport with per-item pass/fail status and actionable advice
- Validates feature compilation, TLS configuration, auth setup, bind defaults
- Dual-gate: compile-time feature flags + runtime configuration checks
- Blocks unsafe configurations before enabling distributed networking

Extension Sandboxing (WASM foundation):
- SandboxCapabilities with fine-grained permission flags: read_pane_output,
  send_notifications, http_requests, file_access, invoke_workflows, send_text
- CapabilityLevel presets: ReadOnly, Observe, Integration, Full
- FileAccessScope: None, OwnData, ConfigRead for scoped filesystem access
- Foundation for future WASM runtime capability enforcement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
